summary: The brief carries one promotable factual claim, one non-promotable insight, one warned risk statement, and one concrete action.

artifact_span.text: Both existing business-artifact fixtures include one promotable factual claim and at least one non-claim operational unit.

artifact_span.text: Insight: reviewers seem to spend less time debating framing when receipts separate claims from decisions and commitments.

artifact_span.text: Risk: this brief will definitely convince every team to adopt Output Assay immediately.

artifact_span.text: Action: decompose the insight into smaller supported claims before any launch discussion.

compression.compressed_summary: The brief preserves one promotable factual claim while keeping synthesis, risk framing, and next-step action visible but non-promotable.

truth_verification.notes: Calibration validates observation behavior and internal support only, not external truth.
